ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the quarter */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the quarter */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the quarter */,
  "points_for" REAL /* Total points scored in the quarter */,
  "points_against" REAL /* Total points conceded in the quarter */,
  "performance_percentage" REAL /* Performance percentage in the quarter */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or Away game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Summary result (Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Qualitative rating of the game performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES season_summary ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_summary" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins in the season */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses in the season */,
  "total_points_for" REAL /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "total_points_against" REAL /* Total points conceded in the season */,
  "season_performance_percentage" REAL /* Season performance percentage */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "average_wins_per_game" REAL /* Average number of wins per game */,
  "average_losses_per_game" REAL /* Average number of losses per game */,
  "average_draws_per_game" REAL /* Average number of draws per game */,
  "average_points_for_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "average_points_against_per_game" REAL /* Average points conceded per game */,
  "season_performance_rating" TEXT /* Qualitative rating of the season performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of field goal attempts by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of successful field goals by the player in the game */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point attempts by the player in the game */,
  "three_points_made" INTEGER /* Number of successful three-point shots by the player in the game */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of successful free throws by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_performance ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injured player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (Scheduled, Postponed, Completed) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (Regular Season, Playoff) */,
  "attendance_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
